flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Notre Dame College rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.9k → $11.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Notre Dame College rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.1k → $22.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Notre Dame College rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.1k → $22.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Notre Dame College rose 113% between 2006 and 2009 (16.2% → 34.5%).
